summary: The user inquired about an old rock song featuring the adlib "hey," which was identified as "Werewolves of London" by Warren Zevon, notably used in the movie Happy Gilmore. The conversation then shifted to a remix by Redfoo, with the user providing a YouTube link to a DJ set that includes various songs, leading to a list of tracks played in the set.
facts: The user is interested in the song "Werewolves of London" by Warren Zevon, which features prominently in the movie Happy Gilmore. Redfoo remixed "Werewolves of London" in a DJ set available on YouTube. The user provided a link to Redfoo's DJ set on YouTube. The DJ set includes the following songs: "Party Rock Anthem" by LMFAO (feat. Lauren Bennett & GoonRock), "Yeah!" by Usher (feat. Lil Jon & Ludacris), "Bojangles" by Pitbull, "Cupid Shuffle" by Cupid, "Cha Cha Slide" by DJ Casper, "Werewolves of London" by Warren Zevon, and "Low" by Flo Rida (feat. T-Pain).
